{props.success ? (
  <div className="rounded-xl border border-emerald-200 bg-emerald-50 p-6 text-center dark:border-emerald-800 dark:bg-emerald-950/30">
    <p className="font-semibold text-emerald-800 text-lg dark:text-emerald-200">
      Application submitted!
    </p>
    <p className="mt-2 text-emerald-700 text-sm dark:text-emerald-300">
      We'll review your application and get back to you soon.
    </p>
  </div>
) : (
  <div className="space-y-6">
    <div>
      <h2 className="font-semibold text-foreground text-xl">Become a Vendor</h2>
      <p className="mt-1 text-muted-foreground text-sm">
        Apply to sell your products on our marketplace.
      </p>
    </div>

    <form onSubmit={props.onSubmit} className="space-y-4">
      <div className="grid gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2">
        <div>
          <label
            htmlFor="vendor-name"
            className="mb-1 block font-medium text-foreground text-sm"
          >
            Business name <span className="text-destructive">*</span>
          </label>
          <input
            id="vendor-name"
            type="text"
            required
            maxLength={200}
            value={props.name}
            onChange={(e) => props.onNameChange(e.target.value)}
            placeholder="Your business name"
            className="w-full rounded-lg border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none ring-offset-background focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-1"
          />
        </div>

        <div>
          <label
            htmlFor="vendor-email"
            className="mb-1 block font-medium text-foreground text-sm"
          >
            Contact email <span className="text-destructive">*</span>
          </label>
          <input
            id="vendor-email"
            type="email"
            required
            maxLength={320}
            value={props.email}
            onChange={(e) => props.onEmailChange(e.target.value)}
            placeholder="you@example.com"
            disabled={props.isAuthenticated}
            className="w-full rounded-lg border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none ring-offset-background focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-1 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-60"
          />
          {props.isAuthenticated && (
            <p className="mt-1 text-muted-foreground text-xs">Using your account email.</p>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>

      <div>
        <label
          htmlFor="vendor-website"
          className="mb-1 block font-medium text-foreground text-sm"
        >
          Website
        </label>
        <input
          id="vendor-website"
          type="url"
          maxLength={500}
          value={props.website}
          onChange={(e) => props.onWebsiteChange(e.target.value)}
          placeholder="https://yourbusiness.com"
          className="w-full rounded-lg border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none ring-offset-background focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-1"
        />
      </div>

      <div>
        <label
          htmlFor="vendor-description"
          className="mb-1 block font-medium text-foreground text-sm"
        >
          Tell us about your business
        </label>
        <textarea
          id="vendor-description"
          maxLength={2000}
          rows={4}
          value={props.description}
          onChange={(e) => props.onDescriptionChange(e.target.value)}
          placeholder="What do you sell? Where are you located? What makes your products unique?"
          className="w-full resize-y rounded-lg border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none ring-offset-background focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-1"
        />
      </div>

      {props.error && (
        <p className="text-destructive text-sm" role="alert">{props.error}</p>
      )}

      <button
        type="submit"
        disabled={props.isLoading}
        className="rounded-lg bg-primary px-6 py-2.5 font-medium text-primary-foreground text-sm transition-opacity hover:opacity-90 disabled:opacity-60"
      >
        {props.isLoading ? "Submitting…" : "Apply to become a vendor"}
      </button>
    </form>
  </div>
)}
